title: Blooming Helmets
description: A whimsical resource pack to wear some floral helmets!
body:
Step into a softer side of survival with Blooming Helmets, a beautifully crafted resource pack that transforms your helmets and items into pieces inspired by nature itself!

**Features:**

- Helmets retextured with delicate floral details. 
- Leather helmets come in various dyed colors, allowing you to mix and match your favorite shades.
- Subtle item retextures help identify your floral apparel. 

**Note:**

This is a smaller version of [Blooming Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blooming-armor). Allowing you to wear flower crowns while also mixing and matching with the other basic armor sets.
